basic_details.job_title: ESIC Medical College Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 83 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad, NIT-3 (Employees' State Insurance Corporation, Ministry of Labour & Employment, Govt. of India)
basic_details.post_name: Senior Resident (Broad Speciality Departments) / Non-PG Resident (ICU – if PG candidates do not appear)
basic_details.total_vacancies: 83 (provisional; subject to increase or decrease as per actual requirement)
basic_details.job_location: ESIC Medical College & Hospital, NH-3, NIT, Faridabad – 121001, Haryana
basic_details.short_information: ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad, NIT-3 (under Employees' State Insurance Corporation, Ministry of Labour & Employment, Government of India) has released a Recruitment Advertisement dated 02.06.2026 (File No: 134/A/19/11/91/2025/Admin (Part-1)) for recruitment of Senior Residents in Broad Speciality Departments on a contractual basis. A total of 83 vacancies have been announced across 19 departments including Anesthesia, ICU, NICU, PICU, General Medicine, Radiology, OBGY, Pediatrics, and others.

important_dates.venue: Faculty Reading Hall, Academic Block, ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad

age_limit.age_details: Contractual – initially 1 year, extendable up to 3 years subject to satisfactory performance and competent authority approval

vacancy_details.Details: As per the latest guidelines of the National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI). MBBS with MD/MS/DNB or equivalent Post Graduate Degree in the concerned speciality from a recognised institution. All qualifications to be supported by Marks Sheets, Attempt Certificate, and Degree Certificate.

Updated Medical Registration Certificate from NMC/State Medical Council with all post-MBBS/MD/MS qualifications. If not available, candidate must produce copy of "Applied for" document at the time of interview. Updated Medical Registration Certificate must be submitted before joining if selected.

vacancy_details.Criteria: Non-PG Resident (ICU only – if PG candidates absent)
vacancy_details.Details: MBBS without PG degree with minimum 02 years of experience, of which at least 1 year in ICU/General Medicine/Emergency Medicine/Casualty/Anesthesia from a government/private hospital (not a private clinic). Appointment will be for 01 year only on contract basis.

salary_details.pay_scale: Senior Resident: ₹1,48,669/- consolidated | Non-PG Resident: ₹1,23,196/- consolidated (as on date of advertisement)
salary_details.senior resident: ₹1,48,669/- per month (as on date of advertisement)
salary_details.non-pg resident (icu only): ₹1,23,196/- per month (as on date of advertisement)
salary_details.details: Additional terms: Hostel accommodation/quarters will be provided to the extent possible; if availed, no HRA will be payable and license fee will be deducted as per rules. The Senior Resident shall not be entitled to PF, Pension, Gratuity, Medical Allowance, Medical Benefits, Seniority, Promotion, or similar perks. Eligibility will be determined as per ESIC HQ Office Memorandum No. Z-11012/51/2022-MED-VI dated 08.12.2022 or subsequent orders issued by HQ.

selection_process: Candidates must report to the Faculty Reading Hall
Faridabad on 08.06.2026 between 9:00 AM and 10:00 AM with their completed offline application form
self-attested copies of all required documents
and original certificates. Only candidates whose documents are successfully verified by the Document Verification Committee will be permitted to appear before the Interview Board.
Selection will be made on the basis of acquired academic credentials and performance in the interview
conducted by a duly constituted Selection Board. Opportunity to appear for interview is on a provisional basis
subject to detailed scrutiny of eligibility criteria.
Note: No TA/DA will be paid to candidates for appearing in the interview or submission of any document.
how_to_apply: Candidates must appear in person at the Walk-in Interview on 08.06.2026 with their completed offline application form (in prescribed format attached with the advertisement) and all required documents. No online application process is involved.
Download the prescribed application form from the official notification.
Fill in the application form completely and correctly for each post applied for. A separate application must be submitted for each post.
Prepare self-attested copies of all required documents as specified in Clause (J) of the notification.
Prepare a Demand Draft of ₹500/- (for applicable categories) in favour of "ESI Fund A/c No. 1" payable at Faridabad.

Report at Faculty Reading Hall, Academic Block, ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad on 08.06.2026 between 9:00 AM and 10:00 AM with the completed application form, self-attested document copies, Demand Draft, and all original certificates for document verification.
Documents Required for Document Verification & Interview (Clause J):
Certificate of passing Class 10th (for Date of Birth)
All Marks Sheets, Attempt Certificate, and Degree Certificate of MBBS
All Marks Sheets, Attempt Certificate, and Degree Certificate of MD/MS/DNB or Other Examination

Valid EWS/OBC-NCL/SC/ST/PwD Certificate issued in format for appointment in Central Government job (wherever applicable); failing which candidate will not be allowed to appear for reserved category but may be treated as UR candidate
Relieving/NOC Certificate from previous/current employer (if applicable)
Walk-in Interview Venue: Faculty Reading Hall, Academic Block, ESIC Medical College & Hospital, NH-3, NIT, Faridabad – 121001 (Haryana)
important_instructions: These vacancies are provisional and may increase or decrease as per actual patient care requirements. The Competent Authority reserves the right of any amendment, cancellation, or changes to this advertisement without prior notice. Reservation will be as per Government of India guidelines issued from time to time. Candidates appointed under PwD quota will be adjusted against the vacancy of respective categories (General/SC/ST/OBC/EWS). In case of non-availability of reserved category candidates, the available meritorious candidate may be given an offer of engagement for a period of 39 days at the sole discretion of the Appointing Authority. All candidates must have updated Medical Registration (NMC/State Medical Council) with all post-MBBS/MD/MS qualifications. If not updated, a copy of "Applied for" document must be shown at the time of interview. Updated certificate must be submitted before joining if selected. Candidates working in Govt./Autonomous/Statutory institutions should preferably bring an NOC from their employer at the time of interview. In case of immediate non-availability, a copy of "applied for NOC" and an undertaking must be submitted at document verification before the interview. No private practice is allowed in any capacity after joining as Senior Resident at ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad. The contract is initially for 1 year, extendable up to 3 years subject to satisfactory performance. The contract will be terminated upon appointment/joining of a bonded Senior Resident on the same post. To resign, the Senior Resident must submit one-month advance notice or deposit an amount equivalent to one month's salary. Failure to comply will result in forfeiture of one-month salary and the security deposit, and may lead to initiation of legal proceedings. Absence from work exceeding 07 days without prior approval from the competent authority will be considered voluntary abandonment of engagement, resulting in automatic termination. Attendance must be recorded both manually and through AEBAS on a daily basis. OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) Certificate should not be prior to 01 (one) year from the cut-off date; must be in the format applicable for Central Government appointment and issued by an Officer not below the rank of Sub-Divisional Officer or equivalent authority. EWS candidates must submit EWS Certificate as per Annexure-I of Govt. of India, Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances & Pensions, DOPT OM No. 36039/1/2019-Estt(Res), dated 31.01.2019. Application should be submitted for each post separately and in the prescribed format only. Application submitted in any other format or incomplete application will be summarily rejected. Mere submission of application does not confer any right to be eligible for interview unless the candidate reports on the scheduled date and time with all required documents. Result will be published only on the Recruitments section of www.esic.gov.in. Offer of Appointment will be sent through Email only. The Dean, ESIC MCH, FBD reserves the right to cancel/postpone the Recruitment Process at any stage at its discretion without notice. All applicants must visit www.esic.gov.in regularly as all subsequent Corrigendum/Addendum/Updates (if any) will only be uploaded on the website.

faq.question: Q1. What is the Walk-in Interview date for ESIC Medical College Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview and Document Verification for Senior Resident (Broad Speciality Departments) on contract basis at ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad, NIT-3 is scheduled on 08 June 2026. Candidates must report between 9:00 AM and 10:00 AM at the Faculty Reading Hall, Academic Block, ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad. Candidates reporting after 10:00 AM will not be entertained.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies and which departments are included in ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 83 vacancies (provisional) have been announced across 19 departments including Anesthesia, Anatomy, Biochemistry, Chest, Forensic Medicine, ICU, General Medicine, NICU, OBGY, Pediatrics, Pharmacology, Physiology, PICU, Radiology, Reproductive Medicine, Radiotherapy, General Surgery, and others. Vacancies are subject to increase or decrease as per actual patient care requirements.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for ESIC Medical College Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is not exceeding 45 years as on the date of Walk-in Interview, i.e., 08.06.2026. Age relaxations as per Government of India guidelines are applicable for reserved category candidates (SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwD) wherever applicable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary/remuneration for Senior Resident at ESIC Medical College Faridabad?
faq.answer: The consolidated pay for Senior Resident is ₹1,48,669/- per month and for Non-PG Resident (ICU only, in absence of PG candidates) is ₹1,23,196/- per month, as on the date of advertisement. Pay will be determined as per ESIC HQ Office Memorandum No. Z-11012/51/2022-MED-VI dated 08.12.2022 or subsequent orders. Senior Residents are not entitled to PF, Pension, Gratuity, Medical Allowance, or similar service benefits.

faq.question: Q5. What is the nature and duration of contract for ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The contract is initially for 01 (one) year, extendable up to 03 years subject to satisfactory performance, willingness, conduct of the candidate, and institutional requirements. The contract will be terminated upon appointment/joining of a bonded Senior Resident on the same post. The competent authority reserves the right to terminate services at any time in public interest without prior notice.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for ESIC Medical College Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹500/- for all categories except SC/ST/ESIC Regular Employees/Female Candidates/PH (PwD) candidates, for whom the fee is NIL. The fee must be paid via a Demand Draft in favour of "ESI Fund A/c No. 1" payable at Faridabad. A separate application with applicable fee must be submitted for each post applied for. Fee once paid is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q7. Is there a security deposit for ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. Selected candidates must submit a Security Deposit of ₹20,000/- via Demand Draft payable to "ESI Fund A/c No. 1" at Faridabad upon joining. The deposit will be refunded on successful completion of the contract period and submission of a "No Dues Certificate." If the selected candidate resigns within six months of joining, the security deposit will be forfeited, except in cases of unforeseen or unavoidable circumstances.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply for multiple departments in ESIC Faridabad Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates may apply for multiple posts listed in this advertisement if they meet the eligibility criteria for each. However, a separate application form along with required documents and applicable application fee must be submitted for each post applied for.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for the Walk-in Interview at ESIC Medical College Faridabad?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring the completed offline application form (in prescribed format) along with self-attested copies and originals of: Class 10th Certificate (for Date of Birth), MBBS Marks Sheets and Degree Certificate, MD/MS/DNB Marks Sheets and Degree Certificate, Updated NMC/State Medical Registration Certificate, Valid Category Certificate (EWS/OBC-NCL/SC/ST/PwD, if applicable), Experience Certificate, recent Passport Size Photograph, Relieving/NOC Certificate from previous/current employer (if applicable), and Aadhaar Card. If the category certificate is not available, the candidate may be treated as UR candidate.

faq.question: Q10. Is private practice allowed for Senior Residents at ESIC Medical College Faridabad?
faq.answer: No. Private practice is strictly not allowed in any capacity after joining as Senior Resident at ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad. Additionally, absence from work exceeding 07 days without prior approval from the competent authority will be treated as voluntary abandonment of engagement, resulting in automatic termination of the contract. Attendance must be recorded both manually and through the Aadhaar Enabled Biometric Attendance System (AEBAS) on a daily basis during scheduled working days.

faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview and Document Verification for Senior Resident (Broad Speciality Departments) on contract basis at ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad, NIT-3 is scheduled on 08 June 2026. Candidates must report between 9:00 AM and 10:00 AM at the Faculty Reading Hall, Academic Block, ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Faridabad. Candidates reporting after 10:00 AM will not be entertained.
